amendments.acquisition: Login node only; approved local cache, then ModelScope through the explicit proxy, before any fallback.
amendments.effort_cap: After one bounded implementation attempt and one targeted repair per failing component, stop with V15_GATE0_STATUS=FAIL_ESCALATED and a root-cause diagnosis.
pi_choices_on_fail_escalated: revert the tempo axis to ACE-Step v1, whose primitives are already proven

completion_reserve.invariant: When no valid completed candidate exists, reserve one measured full-generation transformer-forward-call cost.

fork_calibration.freeze_rule: Choose the smallest scale passing every calibration row before main controls.

research_scope: Engineering validation only; no constraint axis, policy training, vocal/instrumental claim, tempo experiment, or scientific-axis run.

rollover.budget: exactly two measured full-generation transformer-forward-call costs
